mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay_reconciliation_record (created_at, updated_at, recon_date, channel_code, payment_type, channel_serial_no, amount, biz_order_no, recon_result, remark) VALUES (#{createdAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{reconDate}, #{channelCode}, #{paymentType}, #{channelSerialNo}, #{amount}, #{bizOrderNo}, #{reconResult}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pay_reconciliation_record WHERE recon_date = #{reconDate} AND channel_code = #{channelCode} AND payment_type = #{paymentType}
SELECT * FROM pay_reconciliation_record WHERE recon_date = #{reconDate} ORDER BY channel_code ASC, payment_type ASC
